name: TrendSpider
description_short: AI-powered charting platform with automated trendline detection, multi-timeframe analysis, and trading bots.
description_long:
TrendSpider uses artificial intelligence to automate technical analysis tasks that traders traditionally perform manually. The platform automatically detects trendlines, support/resistance levels, Fibonacci retracements, and chart patterns across multiple timeframes simultaneously, saving hours of manual charting work.

The automated multi-timeframe analysis is TrendSpider's killer feature. Instead of manually switching between timeframes, the platform overlays analysis from multiple timeframes on a single chart, revealing confluences that might otherwise be missed. Combined with AI-powered trading bots and backtesting, traders can go from analysis to automated execution.

TrendSpider offers four tiers from Standard ($54/mo) to Advanced ($399/mo), with each tier increasing the number of alerts, bots, and data granularity available. The platform covers stocks, ETFs, forex, crypto, and futures with real-time data.
pros: Automated trendline detection saves hours of manual work
AI trading bots for automated execution
cons: Steep learning curve for all features
Can feel overwhelming for manual traders
